name: clinical-alerts-feed
title: Clinical Alerts Feed
description: A feed of clinical alerts as a panel, most-severe first. Composes WidgetPanel + ClinicalAlertItem with acknowledge / dismiss wiring.

props.name: items
props.description: Alerts; each is a ClinicalAlertItem's props (+ optional id). Provide onAcknowledge / onDismiss.

clinicalNotes: Severity ordering is a safety property — critical alerts must surface at the top regardless of arrival time, which this panel enforces. Pair with real acknowledge/dismiss handlers so alerts leave the feed only when actioned (the underlying item exposes an auditable Acknowledge). Beware alarm fatigue: keep the feed to genuinely actionable alerts and let info/success settle to the bottom.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Provider and Triage blocks.
